title: SE DH09HS Diamond Hole Saw Set (10 Pc.)
description:
Cut precise holes in glass, tile, stone and more with the Universal Tool 10pc Diamond Hole Saw Set! This set comes with ten 80 grit hole saws, each with different sizes: 1/4", 5/16", 3/8", 9/16", 5/8", 11/16", 7/8", 1-3/8", 1-9/16", 2". These hole saws are easy to use with a drill press, and all of them are constructed of durable diamond coated steel. Make sure to grab a set of these hole saws for your next crafting, hobby or home improvement project!

  • Constructed of Durable Diamond Coated Steel
  • Shank Sizes: 3/8" & 1/4"
  • Grit: 80

Product Specifications
